global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a prominent product display and clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time flash sale on the CrispBox.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: CrispBox product
elements.description: A stylized representation of a box with three compartments, featuring a smooth surface and a light pink hue.

elements.label: Box design element
elements.description: Two small circular shapes in a light pink color, positioned below the main product box, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional box design
elements.description: A rectangular shape in a light pink color, slightly larger than the circular shapes, enhancing the product's visual appeal.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button in white with bold text, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Small design element
elements.description: A small circular shape in a light pink color, positioned near the bottom of the banner, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Flash sale live Only this weekend' prominently displayed in the center of the banner.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Only this weekend

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: Large, bold text in white showing the price '€19.99' at the bottom of the banner, drawing attention.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: A simple logo text 'CrispBox' in white, positioned at the top left corner of the banner.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold text, located at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and playful, CrispBox, flash sale, €19.99
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the product is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CrispBox, SALE, Flash sale live Only this weekend, €19.99, Get offer
